# Ken Garcia Portfolio

> Portfolio website of Ken Patrick Garcia, AI Full Stack Engineer.

## Summary

Ken Patrick Garcia builds award-winning full-stack, mobile, and AI-powered software. This site highlights selected projects, experience, certifications, skills, and contact details.

## Primary URL

- https://kenbuilds.tech/

## Key Topics

- AI full-stack engineering
- React and frontend development
- Flutter and mobile development
- Three.js and interactive web experiences
- Award-winning academic and hackathon projects
- RAG and intelligent application development
